abilities.description: When you @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.05909d6310d209a6]{Make a Connection} by sealing a pact with an otherworldly entity (extreme or epic), take an automatic weak hit and spend 1 experience to gain this asset. The entity has no physical presence, but you may use the connection bonus when you make a move that serves its will and channels its powers. If the connection is lost, discard this asset.

When you @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0cfcd6fbaf6135d0]{Face Death} or @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff17e67a59539df4]{Face Desolation}, envision an encounter with the entity in its otherworldly domain and reroll any dice. On a strong hit, take +2 momentum and set your health and spirit to their max value.

When you @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.8704c945023355fb]{Test Your Relationship} after resisting or betraying the entity, choose one.

  • Recommit to its purpose: reroll any dice.
  • Hide your intentions: roll +shadow (instead of heart); on a strong hit, mark two ticks on your quests legacy track.
